arts.ttl: Preview: Stoke City vs. Watford - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Stoke City and Watford, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
